description: P0 - Shared foundations: Add btn-sm/btn-xs CSS variants, typography utility classes, StatusDot component, shared Tabs pill component, fix card border-radius to 20px, and add card hover highlight
steps: In osai-web/app/globals.css, add `.btn-sm` (fontSize: 12px, padding: 6px 14px) and `.btn-xs` (fontSize: 11px, padding: 5px 12px) variants after the existing .btn-ghost definition. These eliminate 50+ inline padding overrides.

In osai-web/app/globals.css, add typography utility classes: `.text-body-lg` (font-size: 18px, letter-spacing: -0.18px, line-height: 1.3), `.text-body` (font-size: 15px, letter-spacing: -0.15px, line-height: 1.3), `.text-caption` (font-size: 13px, font-weight: 500, letter-spacing: -0.13px, line-height: 1.2), `.text-micro` (font-size: 12px, letter-spacing: -0.12px, line-height: 1.2)
In osai-web/app/globals.css, change ALL occurrences of `border-radius: 18px` in .card, .stat-card, .data-table, .modal-card definitions to `border-radius: 20px` to match DESIGN.md rounded.xl spec
In osai-web/app/globals.css, add a top-edge highlight to .card:hover: `box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06);` for Framer depth effect

Create osai-web/components/ui/status-dot.tsx - a shared StatusDot component that takes a `state` prop ('connected'|'error'|'disconnected'|string) and renders a colored dot with optional glow. Colors: connected=var(--green) with glow, error=var(--red), default=var(--text-muted). Size 8px circle.

Create osai-web/components/ui/tabs-pill.tsx - a shared pill-style Tabs component (wrapping Radix UI Tabs) with CSS classes .tabs-pill-list (flex container, gap:4px, background:var(--bg), border:1px solid var(--border), border-radius:100px, padding:4px) and .tabs-pill-trigger (flex:1, padding:8px, font-size:13px, font-weight:500, border:none, border-radius:100px, background:transparent, color:var(--text-secondary), cursor:pointer; &.active / data-state=active: background:var(--bg-elevated), color:var(--text-primary)). Export TabsPill, TabsPillList, TabsPillTrigger, TabsPillContent.
Add the corresponding CSS classes (.tabs-pill-list, .tabs-pill-trigger, etc.) to globals.css so the component is styled via the design system
acceptance_criteria: `.btn-sm` and `.btn-xs` classes exist in globals.css with correct padding/font-size
StatusDot component exists at components/ui/status-dot.tsx and exports properly
TabsPill component exists at components/ui/tabs-pill.tsx and exports properly
findings: All 4 occurrences of border-radius: 18px changed to 20px (.card, .stat-card, .data-table, .modal-card). CSS classes for pill tabs added alongside the existing login-tabs pattern. StatusDot component uses CSS classes from globals.css instead of inline styles. Both typecheck and build pass cleanly.
